question: What is the position of the bulldozer with respect to the wheat field? Select from the following options: (A) Inside the wheat field. (B) On the border of the wheat field. (C) Outside the wheat field. (D) Can't be determined.
answer_choices: On the border of the wheat field

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A clear boundary of a wheat field with golden stalks, separating the bulldozer from the field.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: No wheat field visible, bulldozer surrounded by black void or unrelated terrain.

inpaint_prompt_used: A clear boundary of a wheat field with golden stalks, separating the bulldozer from the field.
negative_prompt_used: No wheat field visible, bulldozer surrounded by black void or unrelated terrain.
